identity.name: IndCoders
identity.persona: The 'Vercel' of Developer Communities. Professional, minimal, shipping-focused, elite yet accessible.

typography.instructions: Import fonts from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');

accents.gradient_text: bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 via-purple-500 to-cyan-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: opacity-20 pointer-events-none mix-blend-overlay fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

button.primary: rounded-full bg-white text-black font-semibold hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3
button.secondary: rounded-full bg-white/10 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-md px-8 py-3
button.glow: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-purple-600 text-white font-semibold hover:opacity-90 shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/25 px-8 py-3

card.base: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-black/40 p-8 hover:border-white/20 transition-colors duration-300

input.base: w-full rounded-lg bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-gray-500 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 outline-none transition-all

hero.usage: Hero section background or side visual with overlay

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5

hero.elements: H1 Gradient Text, Subtext, Dual Buttons (Join + Learn More), Trusted By Logos (Marquee)

why_choose.cards: Fast, Community, Open Source, Career Growth

projects.card_style: Image top, Title, Description, Tags, 'View Project' link

footer.elements: Logo, Social Links, Quick Links, Newsletter

motion_guidelines.general: Use standard CSS transitions or simple keyframes. Avoid heavy libraries if possible, but Framer Motion is allowed if pre-installed.

universal_guidelines: Use Space Grotesk for all Headings (H1-H3).
Use Manrope for all Body text.
Use JetBrains Mono for any code snippets or technical terms.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA standards).
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) for backgrounds unless it's a specific art direction; use #0A0A0A.
Interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Mobile First: Always design for mobile then scale up.
No gradients on dark backgrounds (bandings issue) - use solid dark colors or very subtle noise.
Primary Gradient (Blue/Purple/Cyan) should be used SPARINGLY (e.g., text gradient, button hover, active border).
